center.name: 东非
center.summary: 东非是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联42种鸟类，包括Eastern crested guinea fowl、Dusky turtle dove、Quail-plover等42种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: capense is endemic to Southern and Eastern Africa from Kenya and the Eastern Cape to Western Angola. The African barred owlet occurs in open habitats with trees such as gallery forest, woodland, forest edge and secondary growth

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The African grey flycatcher, grayish flycatcher, or large flycatcher (Bradornis microrhynchus) is a passerine bird in the Old World flycatcher family Muscicapidae that occurs in parts of East Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in grassland and fields in Southern, Central and East Africa, south-east of a line from Angola through the DRCongo to Sudan

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits forest and scrub in Southern and East Africa from southern and eastern parts of South Africa north as far as the Chyulu Hills in Kenya

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is migratory, wintering in East Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits forests mainly in East Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |last105=Zhang |first105=Guojie |title=Whole-genome analyses resolve early branches in the tree of life of modern birds |journal=Science |pages=1320–1331 |doi=10.1126/science.1253451 |date=12 December 2014|volume=346 |issue=6215 |pmid=25504713 |pmc=4405904 |bibcode=2014Sci...346.1320J }} The species is found in the wild in the drier regions of West Africa to East Africa, as well as Sahel. It is one of the remaining six species of mousebirds

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in West, East and southern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is mainly native to the Albertine Rift montane forests and the East African montane forests of East Africa, in the regions surrounding Lake Victoria

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Eastern Arc Mountains of East Africa from the Ukaguru Mountains and Uluguru Mountains of central Tanzania south-westwards as far as the Misuku Hills in northernmost Malawi and the Njesi Highlands in northern Mozambique. It inhabits evergreen forest from above sea-level and is most common around

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The dusky turtle dove is found in East Africa and South Arabia: Eritrea, Somalia, southern Sudan, Ethiopia, Uganda, Tanzania, Malawi, Burundi, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Yemen (disjunctive population), and southern Saudi Arabia (disjunctive population)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The eastern crested guinea fowl (Guttera pucherani) is a species of guinea fowl native to East Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in arid savanna of East Africa, ranging from Djibouti in north to Tanzania in south

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | date=2024 | title=Enigmas no longer: using ultraconserved elements to place several unusual hawk taxa and address the non-monophyly of the genus Accipiter (Accipitriformes: Accipitridae) | journal=Biological Journal of the Linnean Society | article-number=blae028 | doi=10.1093/biolinnean/blae028}} It is native to sub-Saharan Africa, where it has a widespread distribution with populations in southern, East and West Africa.{{Cite journal |last1=Reading |first1=Richard P

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: uropygialis in coastal Kenya]] The northern red-fronted tinkerbird (Pogoniulus uropygialis) is a small bird in the African barbet family Lybiidae that is found in East Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The olive bee-eater is found in the grassland and coastal mountain forests of East Africa and Madagascar, and an isolated population can be found in coastal Angola. There are two subspecies; M

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The parrot-billed sparrow (Passer gongonensis) is found in the arid lowlands of eastern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The quail-plover, lark buttonquail or lark-plover (Ortyxelos meiffrenii) is a small ground-living bird in the buttonquail family Turnicidae that is found in the Sahel region of Africa and in a disjunct region of East Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: humilis song recorded in Kenya | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Cisticola | species = chiniana | authority = (Smith, 1843) | synonyms = }} The rattling cisticola (Cisticola chiniana) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae which is native to Africa south of the equator, and parts of East Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in East Africa, within the borders of Ethiopia, Kenya, Somalia, Somaliland, South Sudan, and Tanzania

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to East Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Habitat of superb starlings in Western Serengeti The superb starling lives in the savanna, thornbush and acacia arid areas, open woodland, lakeshore woodlands, gardens and cultivated fields, at an elevation of above sea level. They tend to avoid humid lowland areas. This species has a very large range and can commonly be found in East Africa, including Somalia, Uganda, Kenya, South Sudan, Ethiopia and Tanzania. Superb Starlings typically occupy large territories, often exceeding

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The tropical shearwater is found in the tropical parts of the western Indian Ocean from East Africa to southern India and in similar regions of the Pacific from just to the southeast of Japan to French Polynesia.{{cite book |last1=Redman |first1=N

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Found in several small patches of Central and East Africa, Turner's eremomela's distribution is quite patchy and not very well known

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Von der Decken's hornbill (Tockus deckeni) is a hornbill found in East Africa, especially to the east of the East African Rift, from Ethiopia south to Tanzania

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to sub-Saharan Africa, especially East and southern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: boehmiSerengeti National Park, Tanzania | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | parent_authority = Reichenbach, 1863 | taxon = Dinemellia dinemelli | authority = (Rüppell, 1845) }} The white-headed buffalo weaver or white-faced buffalo-weaver (Dinemellia dinemelli) is a species of passerine bird in the family Ploceidae native to East Africa. The buffalo part of its name derives from its habit of following the African buffalo, feeding on disturbed insects. Two subspecies are recognized

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: 194–195. Western Asian birds winter in the northern Indian Ocean, and S.h.tibetana appears to be common off East Africa during the Northern Hemisphere winter.Zimmerman et al

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is a long-distance migrant, wintering in east Africa and south to Madagascar and south-eastern South Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pelicans arrive in the Danube in late March or early April and depart after breeding from September to late November. Wintering locations for European pelicans are not exactly known but wintering birds may occur in northeastern Africa through Iraq to north India, with a particularly large number of breeders from Asia wintering around Pakistan and Sri Lanka. Northern populations migrate to China, India, Myanmar, with stragglers reaching Java and Bali in Indonesia. These are birds that are found mostly in lowlands, though in East Africa and Nepal may be found living at elevations of up to . Overall, the great white pelican is one of the most widely distributed species

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is widely distributed in Southern and Eastern Africa, and is a vagrant to the southern Arabian Peninsula. It prefers open woodland and savanna, and it is for the most part absent from treeless places

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is widely spread across the African tropical rainforest primarily throughout West and Central Africa, but is also found in Southern and East Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: British Ornithologists' Union. In east Africa and central Africa, the tawny eagle is found in central and eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo and throughout the drier portions of Uganda and in the entire nations of Kenya, Tanzania, Zambia (quite often residing in the Luangwa valley and the Chambeshi drainage), Malawi and Mozambique

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The steppe eagle is entirely migratory, wintering in east and, to a lesser extent, southern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The blue-capped cordon-bleu or blue-capped cordonbleu (Uraeginthus cyanocephalus) is native to Ethiopia, Kenya, Somalia, South Sudan, and Tanzania in East Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In the tropical parts of its wintering range, like East Africa, it appears to be mainly found in the higher areas. The western house martin is a migrant which moves on a broad front (i.e., European birds are not funnelled through the short sea crossings used by large soaring birds, but cross the Mediterranean and Sahara). While migrating they feed in the air on insects, and they usually travel in daylight. Migration brings its own hazards; in 1974, several hundred thousand birds of this species were found dead or dying in the Swiss Alps and surrounding areas, caught by heavy snowfall and low temperatures

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in south-eastern Siberia and Northern China before migrating in large flocks across India and over the Arabian Sea to winter in Southern and East African coasts

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The African pygmy falcon (Polihierax semitorquatus)—or simply pygmy falcon—is a diminutive raptor native to eastern and southern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellow-bellied waxbill (Coccopygia quartinia) is a species of estrildid finch native to East Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: On its western route, it passes over Central Asia and Turkey to winter in Israel, Palestine and Lebanon, a few regions in Saudi Arabia, as well as Eastern Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: erlangeri Salvadori, 1908 }} Rüppell's vulture (Gyps rueppelli), also called Rüppell's griffon vulture or Rüppell's griffon, a species of vulture named after Eduard Rüppell, is a large, resident bird of prey, mainly native to the Sahel region and East Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The wintering areas overlap with the breeding range, but also include extensive areas in West Africa, East Africa south to Lake Malawi, and further north in Ethiopia, South Sudan and Eritrea. The large majority of birds wintering in eastern Africa are of the southwest Asian race, S
